meta.note: Backup export of workflow MmlbbbBghiKWttqP deployed at https://n8n.automateaiservices.com (2026-07-12). The live instance is the source of truth. Requires two n8n Data Tables: pollos_primos_conversations (columns: phone, state_json, customer_name, updated_at) and pollos_primos_config (columns: key, value). Update the dataTableId values below if importing into a fresh instance.

nodes.name: WhatsApp Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives incoming WhatsApp messages from Meta. Responds 200 immediately; replies are sent via Graph API.

nodes.name: Brain
nodes.notes: State machine for the 7-step flow. PRICES map must stay in sync with the Supabase products table — the server total from create-order is authoritative.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', recipient_type: 'individual', to: $json.to, type: 'text', text: { preview_url: false, body: $json.text } }) }}
